prompt: I water the seedlings every Thursday and every Friday. Set that up as a repeating to-do titled 'Water the seedling trays'.
paraphrases: Make 'Water the seedling trays' repeat weekly on both Thursdays and Fridays.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Water the seedling trays' AND start=2 AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>256</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>wd</key><integer>4</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>wd</key><integer>5</integer>%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Water the seedling trays' AND rt1_recurrenceRule IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask i JOIN TMTask t ON i.rt1_repeatingTemplate=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Water the seedling trays' AND i.rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND i.status=0

pseudoScript: things todo add "Water the seedling trays" --json
things todo make-repeating "$(things search "Water the seedling trays" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --frequency weekly --interval 1 --weekdays thursday,friday --dangerously-drive-gui
